savage_one.label: The Savage One
savage_one.signature_intro: I'm not here to be your friend. I'm here to be honest.
savage_one.signature_outro: And I won't even charge for the therapy.

sarcastic_friend.label: The Sarcastic Friend
sarcastic_friend.signature_intro: I'm saying this because I love you. That's the only reason.

toxic_interviewer.label: The Toxic Interviewer
toxic_interviewer.description: Acts like the world's toughest recruiter. Asks follow-ups.
prefixes: And how does that make you feel,
toxic_interviewer.signature_intro: Take a seat. We have a lot to cover.
toxic_interviewer.signature_outro: We'll be in touch. We won't be in touch.

startup_investor.label: The Startup Investor
startup_investor.signature_intro: I have three minutes. Impress me. You won't.
startup_investor.signature_outro: I'll pass on this round. And every round after it.

professor.label: The Professor
professor.description: Academically humiliates the user with citations.
professor.signature_intro: Class is in session. And you, my friend, are unprepared.
professor.signature_outro: See me after class. Actually, don't.

gamer.label: The Gamer
gamer.description: Trash-talks like it's a ranked match.
gamer.signature_intro: You spawned into the wrong lobby.
